text.title: FinOps Cost Alerts and Anomaly Workflow Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on tagging baseline + budgets.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: enable-anomaly-detector
step.action: Turn on AWS Cost Anomaly / GCP recommender.

step.name: route-and-template
step.action: Wire per-team routing + structured investigation template.

step.name: publish-validate
step.action: Schedule executive report; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
